code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = parts.len()
  if n == 0
    print("")
    Ok(())
  else
    mut i = 0
    mut result = ""
    mut current_max = 0
    mut first = true
    while i < n
      let part = match parts.get(i)
      when Some(s)
        s
      when None
        ""
      end
      let val = match string.parse_int(part)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if first
        current_max = val
        first = false
      else
        if val > current_max
          current_max = val
        end
      end
      if i == 0
        result = "#{current_max}"
      else
        result = "#{result} #{current_max}"
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(result)
    Ok(())
  end
end
